steps.title: Start with the general linear form
steps.content: A linear equation is $y = mx + b$. We know the slope $m = 28$.

steps.title: Use the point (0, 0) to find b
steps.content: Substituting $(0, 0)$ into the equation: $0 = 28(0) + b$ gives $b = 0$. So $y = 28x$.

steps.title: Identify a from the given form
steps.content: We're given that $f(x) = ax$. Since we've determined $f(x) = 28x$, we have $a = 28$.
